name: invitation-admin-system
description: Complete invitation management system with admin panel - Modular Version

scripts.setup: npm run db:reset && npm run db:seed && npm run db:migrate:gameroom && npm run db:migrate:booths && npm run db:migrate:wishtree && npm run db:seed:gameroom && npm run db:seed:questionnaire && npm run db:seed:wishtree && npm run generate:qrcodes && npm run generate:registration-qrcode
scripts.backup: node -e "const config=require('./config'); const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const src=path.resolve(config.database.path); const dest=src.replace('.db', '_backup_'+new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g,'-')+'.db'); fs.copyFileSync(src,dest); console.log('Database backed up to:', dest);"
scripts.status: npm run db:info && echo '\n=== Server Status ===' && ps aux | grep 'node server.js' | grep -v grep || echo 'Server not running'
scripts.generate-certs: mkdir -p certs && openssl req -x509 -newkey rsa:4096 -keyout certs/key.pem -out certs/cert.pem -days 365 -nodes -subj "/C=TW/ST=Taiwan/L=Taipei/O=MICE-AI/OU=Development/CN=localhost"
